parameters.architecture: GQA (8 KV heads x 128 head_dim = 1024 KV dim)

key_finding: WEAK/MARGINAL: Position-sweep V|nums positive 20/20 bins (L16) but bootstrap p=0.137 (NOT significant). Peak V|nums=0.369. 3-model gradient: channel strength scales with accuracy (Qwen 88%->0.50 p=0.01, Phi 85%->0.54 p=0.003, Mistral 44%->0.37 p=0.14). Mistral partial exception — suggestive but inconclusive. nums_R dominates (0.43 mean) due to accuracy selection.
evidence_impact: Phase 2 natural_usage remains STRONG (maintained by Qwen + Phi). Mistral confirmed as boundary case. 3-model gradient is informative: hidden channel matters more for models that solve harder problems. No downgrade to Phase 2 evidence.
next_planned: Paper-ready 3-model figure. Or Llama position-sweep (4th family, ~55% accuracy). Or accuracy-subsampling control on Qwen/Phi.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: STRONG: Position-sweep V|nums on 2 families (Qwen p=0.01; Phi p=0.003). Mistral WEAK/MARGINAL (p=0.14). 3-model gradient: channel strength ~ accuracy. Per-operation V|nums on 2 families. WRRA on 2 families. Paraphrase NULL for non-number tokens.

cross_model_replication.status: STRONG: Phase 1 complete (4 families). Phase 2: position-sweep STRONG on 2 families (Qwen+Phi), WEAK on Mistral. Per-operation probing on 2 families, WRRA on 2 families. 3-model gradient established.
